name: vscode-nav2-bt-editor
description: Visual editor for ROS 2 Nav2 and BehaviorTree.CPP XML behavior trees.

commands.title: Nav2 BT Editor: Add TreeNodesModel Definitions from XML File
Nav2 BT Editor: Add TreeNodesModel Definitions from URL
Nav2 BT Editor: Add BehaviorTree SubTrees from XML File
Nav2 BT Editor: Add BehaviorTree SubTrees from URL
Nav2 BT Editor: Remove Selected TreeNodesModel Definitions
Nav2 BT Editor: Remove Selected BehaviorTree SubTrees
Nav2 BT Editor: Clear All TreeNodesModel Definitions
Nav2 BT Editor: Clear All BehaviorTree SubTrees

nav2BtEditor.autoSaveEdits.description: Automatically save the XML file after applying attribute changes from the behavior tree editor.

nav2BtEditor.allowEmptyAttributes.description: Allow empty XML attributes when applying edits. When false, empty attributes are removed from the XML.

nav2BtEditor.openOnlyOneBehaviorTree.description: Show only one BehaviorTree at a time. When false, SubTree nodes can be expanded inline into one combined graph.

nav2BtEditor.autoFitOnTreeChange.description: Automatically fit the graph view after opening, closing, or navigating BehaviorTree/SubTree views. When false, the current zoom and pan are preserved.

nav2BtEditor.includeFullBehaviorTree.description: When adding an imported BehaviorTree as a SubTree, also insert the full referenced BehaviorTree XML into the current file. When false, only the SubTree reference is inserted.

scripts.test: npm run clean:test && tsc -p ./tsconfig.test.json && node --test out-test/test/bt_parser.test.js
